english: deck (of a ship) / deck (of a bus, building)
notes: Refers to the deck of a ship, a double-decker bus, or a multi-story structure. Also used in card games (Kartendeck).

sentences.german: Die Passagiere standen auf dem Deck des Schiffes und schauten aufs Meer.
sentences.english: The passengers stood on the deck of the ship and looked out at the sea.

sentences.german: Wir saßen auf dem oberen Deck des Busses.
sentences.english: We sat on the upper deck of the bus.
